open_tasks: Live-test /do-restore end-to-end in Slack — verify droplet creates, nginx welcome page loads, health check posts result to thread.
Verify nginx welcome page shows correct droplet name and restore timestamp (IP field shows '(see Slack)' by design).

completed_this_session: Merged next-cc to main and deleted next-cc branch.

Added interactive Block Kit button confirmations to /do-snapshot Slack flow: shutdown prompt before snapshotting (active droplets only), restart prompt after snapshot completes if bot shut the droplet down.
Wired build_welcome_cloud_init() into _restore_job() — nginx welcome page now installs via cloud-init on every Slack-triggered restore.
Updated restore health check message to include clickable http:// URL.
Created docs/snaprestore-viz.md — ASCII architecture diagrams for local scripts, Slack bot flow, and secret injection.
Created docs/slack-integration-options.md — snapshot delete commands, Socket Mode vs HTTP Events API comparison, free controller alternatives (Oracle, Fly.io, Lambda analysis, local, Render/Railway).
Created docs/benchmarks-speed-tests.md — timing methodology, typical ranges by disk usage, comparison table vs alternatives, benchmark log template, optimization tips.
Created docs/PARKING_LOT.md — checkbox backlog for parity items, Slack commands, and bot improvements.
Committed and pushed all changes to main (018cb24).
Deployed updated bot.py to controller droplet; confirmed active (running).
